feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,651Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 118

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Brightest Star in the Night
entry.summary:
Author: FPeanutButter98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,033Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 112

Summary: When Batman saves an Alien from Luthor, he doesn't expect to fall in love with him. For Kal, Bruce is everything he could have dreamed of. In a world where everything is a secret, having someone by your side is the best superpower of all._Note, you do not need to have read Absolute Superman to understand this fic!

entry.title: The one where Hal Jordan learnt something
entry.summary:
Author: Bisexual_capricorn

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,036Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: Hal was ogling Bruce but not with the, mostly, noble intentions Clark had. No, Hal had his eyes glued to Bruce body. He had seen the Brucie's photoshots for the magazines, but it would never compare to the real body, a testament to Bruce's discipline. Still, it did not justify the way Hal was almost drooling over him. Darn it, this was a work place, a professional place and Hal should know better. Or Clark finally gets together with Bruce and traumatizes Hal with his jealously. Fic inspired by this TikTok: https://vt.tiktok.com/ZSm95voGC/

entry.title: Even If We Both Break Down
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,957Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 44

Summary: Bruce Wayne is the world's greatest detective. He can solve any crime, track any criminal, predict any outcome. But when it comes to love, he only knows one equation: caring equals loss.Now Clark's patience is wearing thin, and Bruce is finally forced to confront what he's been cataloguing all along: you can't protect someone by making them feel worthless. Sometimes the only thing more terrifying than losing someone is realizing you're losing them by choice.A character study about apologizing, about learning to be present instead of perfect, and about two men figuring out that love isn't a tactical problem to be solved—it's a choice to be made, again and again, even when the math says it's safer to run.

entry.title: This is a Love Story
entry.summary:
Author: IBarkAtPeopleRun

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,035Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Bruce Wayne used to paint before he was Batman. After a few years of not painting, he dreams of someone he's never met and painted him. Who could this man in his dreams be?

entry.title: The never ending Cycle
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,568Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: "Wait..." A column of earth came between them, separating them. Bruce looked at him annoyed, no recognition in his gaze. Clark wanted to scream, "It's me. We were best friends. We were more. I loved you. I know you did too. I failed you. I left you when you needed me. I'm sorry. Please remember me..." Instead, as he had done so many, too many times before, he said nothing. Bryce was right to laugh at him. He was such a coward.   "Dad?" "Yes, Terry...let's go..."   Clark saw him turn away, his body doing nothing, his voice caught in his throat. It was Dick who took action. "We're here for you." "I already said I'm not enlisting..." "You're the Avatar!"

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: No Compasses, No Signs
entry.summary:
Author: Starlighter_Varda

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 219,851Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 607

Summary: Between dealing with Gotham and the child he’d impulsively adopted, the last thing Bruce Wayne needed was to develop strong yet confusing feelings for the reporter Clark Kent. To make things worse, his rivals for Clark's affections are Lex Luthor and Superman! The maddening desire, jealousy, and distraction stemming from his fixation on this man are almost manageable...until Clark starts showing an interest in the Batman.________________ Or, How Bruce Wayne's Sexuality Crisis Led to Him Accidentally Baby-Trapping Superman.

entry.summary:
Author: WriterDMathis

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,474Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,746Chapters: 10/32Kudos: 77

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

entry.title: Now close those eyes and let me love you to death
entry.summary:
Author: Ana Luz (AnaLuz13)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,197Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: The one Bruce finally listens to Superman’s explanation, and discovers that both men that causes him torment are the same person; or alien. — B, can we speak for a moment? It was not unusual for Superman to show up at his lab when they were in the Watchtower, the Hall of Justice or any other League’s location, and Batman has always been obsessed enough over the alien to remember this means he would speak a lot and needed someone to listen to him. He never minded doing it before, he still likes hearing his voice, even if it makes his heart aches. — Huh. The grunt, as usual, was enough for Superman. — We are friends, right? He has never asked before, every time he spoke as them as friends, he was sure of what he was speaking. The doubt on his voice makes Bruce forget his resentment and turn to face him.

entry.title: You can take the boy from the circus
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,142Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 548

Summary: Damian Al-Ghul Wayne had everything at one point. He was a prince. Ibn al Xu'ffasch. Son of the bat. Heir to the demon. He had never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his palace in Nanda Parbat. He had never asked to be shipped to a gloomy, grey city. Even when his father kept taking in orphans and ruining his plans for inheritance, Damian stood steadfast. But then his father died, leaving behind his newest orphan. A tiny acrobat with watery blue eyes and black curls, who spoke no English. Damian knew the boy never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his circus troupe. Damian knew he needed to be there for him.

entry.title: Dark Days and Lost Suns
entry.summary:
Author: Athena_Faymont

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 232,055Chapters: 28/28Kudos: 258

Summary: Clark admires Batman, the man who has given up civilian life to protect everyone else's, the tough, sharp, and compassionate man. Bruce admires Superman, the alien who, despite being able to dominate them all by force, has decided to take care of a planet that isn't his own.And, even with these two flawed principles, neither of them can imagine how alone the other feels... and how alone they themselves are. This is a long story, the superbat fanfic I've always wanted to write about how, within the canon, one day something changes and they find each other. If you want to join me on this adventure, we'll be here every Friday! [Puedes encontrarlo en español en mi perfil.]

entry.title: No More Working For You, Mr Wayne!
entry.summary:
Author: bugabug619

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,381Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Bruce Wayne had to endure a meeting with a too-eager investor, and now all he wants to do is go home.It just so happens that Alfred, his ever present butler, called his secretary to make him take the next four days off. He listens, of course, and he gets to spend a nice day in with his husband. With the added chaos of his children. Or: bruce is forced into bed by alfred and bruce. kids think he's an imposter. with fluff in the middle.

entry.title: The Ghost King's Family (of Knights)
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,489Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 41

Summary: The GIW had found Danny. His Parents had sacrificed themselves to try to protect not only him but his fraid. However, the GIW were one step ahead of them and had erected a barrier that no ghost or human could pass through. Desperate to not only get his fraid to safety but to stop the GIW from destroying the Infinite Realms and in turn all of the other universes, Danny (with the help of Clockwork) used a portal to get his fraid out of Amity Park for help.

entry.title: Clark first finds out Bruce has a tattoo!
entry.summary:
Author: naydene_is_ICONIC

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 576Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: A nice morning between Clark and Bruce, where Clark finds out he might not know his boyfriend as well as he thinks Possibly a collection of superbat fics centered around Bruce or Clark having tattoos/piercings! First POSTED fic, hope you enjoy. And thank you @gicoon8987 on tumblr for inspiring me with your wonderful fanart of Bruce!
